log: REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Giff — Winged Striker.

REASONING: HP CRITICAL (14/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Giff — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Giff — Winged Striker.

→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Giff — Winged Striker HP: -16/67

REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
